identity.canonical_title: THE ZERO POINT POTENTIAL V(phi) (THE TOPOLOGICAL ENERGY LANDSCAPE)

theory.canonical_statement: The entry records the zero point potential v(phi) (the topological energy landscape) through the Septenary derivation layer, using the displayed relations as operational anchors for the canonical equation chain.

latex_blocks: P_{\mathrm{null}}(v) = \begin{cases} v, & g(v,w)=0\ \text{for all}\ w\in T_pM,\\ 0, & \text{otherwise}. \end{cases}
canonical_equation.source_section_latex:
\[
P_{\mathrm{null}}(v) = \begin{cases} v, & g(v,w)=0\ \text{for all}\ w\in T_pM,\\ 0, & \text{otherwise}. \end{cases}
\]
\[
g(v,w)=0 \qquad \forall w\in T_pM.
\]
\[
P_{\mathrm{null}}(v)=v.
\]
